data.raceName: TALL TIMBERS PONY CLUB MIDWAY MAIDEN
data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. TITAN OF FURY in what was his second run this prep came home strongly from sixth of nine into the turn to finish third over 1250m at Newcastle last start when sent out at long odds. Racing in a fitter state should be finishing in the top three once again. 5. MOANA GOLD finished a game third of eight last start at the first run back from a spell over 1100m at this track. Trained here and jumping from an inside draw in a fitter state has to be respected. 6. MRS MAREE resumed from a spell and finished fifth of six over 1100m at Rosehill last start after she raced on the speed for most of the trip. Fitter and racing in an easier line-up should jump as the favourite and prove hard to beat. 4. TIME TO DANCE is on debut and should attract support following a close-up third of nine in a recent 816m trial at Warwick Farm. Watch the late betting market to get a better guide with regard to his winning chances.","runners":[1,5,6,4],"exclusive":true}
